final:
// // This module implements a 32-bit arithmetic shift register with synchronous load. It supports shifting left by 1 or 2 bits, and right by 1 or 2 bits. The 'amount' signal selects the direction and magnitude of the shift.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input load,
    input ena,
    input [1:0] amount,
    input [31:0] data,
    output reg [31:0] q);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (load) begin
            q <= data;
        end else if (ena) begin
            case (amount)
                2'b00: q <= q << 1;  // Shift left by 1 bit
                2'b01: q <= q << 2;  // Shift left by 2 bits
                2'b10: q <= $signed(q) >>> 1;  // Arithmetic shift right by 1 bit
                2'b11: q <= $signed(q) >>> 2;  // Arithmetic shift right by 2 bits
                default: q <= q;  // No change
            endcase
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 32-bit arithmetic shift register with synchronous load. It supports shifting left by 1 or 2 bits, and right by 1 or 2 bits. The 'amount' signal selects the direction and magnitude of the shift.
